授業の概要・背景: This course will be taught in English at the 二級 level.
授業方法: Each class will have the following format:30 minutes: Listening to a lecture20 minutes: Speaking practice with a partner25 minutes: Reading practice15 minutes: Writing practice

第1回:
【Startup Week】
Online class （On-demand format）
《90 minutes》
Lecture: Prestige
URL: See LUNA for details.
第2回:
【Core Week ①】
Face-to-face class
《90 minutes》
Lecture: Social Identity
第3回:
【Core Week ②】
Face-to-face class
《90 minutes》
Lecture: Audience Design
第4回:
【Core Week ③】
Face-to-face class
《90 minutes》
Lecture: Accommodation Theory
第6回:
【Flex Hours】
Online class （Task-oriented format）
《90 minutes》
Lecture: How to give a high quality five minute speech in English

Face-to-face class
《90 minutes》

Face-to-face class

Written Test 1
Speaking Test 1

【Review】
Review the contents of lectures to prepare for the short test.
